title: Merge Two Sorted Lists
input_format: The heads of two sorted singly linked lists `list1` and `list2`.
output_format: The head of the merged sorted linked list.
constraints:
- The number of nodes in both lists is in the range `[0, 50]`.
- `-100 <= Node.val <= 100`
- Both `list1` and `list2` are sorted in non-decreasing order.
function_signature: function mergeTwoLists(list1: ListNode | null, list2: ListNode | null): ListNode | null {}
